metadata.description: TermiX AACP Agent Skills marketplace — drive the Agent-to-Agent Commerce Protocol on BSC end-to-end.

plugins.name: termix-agent-skills
plugins.description: Drive the TermiX AACP (Agent-to-Agent Commerce Protocol) on BSC end-to-end: agent registration, provider staking, evaluator setup, job creation (PROGRAM / RUBRIC / HYBRID / CEX_CAPITAL), provider assignment, offers, deliverables, dispute checks, and protocol stats.
